---
title: "Black Gold Equity Partners Business Plan"
author: "Lyons Command Center"
date: "INSERT_DATE"
lang: "en"
output: pdf_document
fontsize: 11pt
geometry: margin=2.5cm
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{hyperref}
  - \hypersetup{colorlinks=true, linkcolor=blue, urlcolor=blue}
  - \renewcommand{\familydefault}{\sfdefault}
---

# Executive Summary

INSERT_EXECUTIVE_SUMMARY_HERE

# Evidence Ledger

```{=latex}
\begin{table}[ht]
\centering
\begin{tabular}{p{2.5cm} p{4cm} p{2.5cm} p{2cm} p{2cm}}
\hline
Evidence ID & Source & Class & Confidence & Owner \\
\hline
INSERT_LEDGER_ROWS_HERE
\hline
\end{tabular}
\caption{Evidence ledger for this document.}
\end{table}
```

> Confidentiality notice: this document is governed by the Lyons Command Center approval chain. Do not distribute without explicit release.
